title: psychotria retusa
intro: Psychotria retusa, also known as "Hill or Wild Coffee", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Psychotria retusa include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its active compounds to be extracted and utilized for medicinal purposes.
